lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Hi there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some more headgear?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Call me The 'Wedge', I'm the taskmaster for the Achievement Diary here in Kandarin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In and around Kandarin it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In and around Kandarin it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Well, there are four different Kandarin headgears, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: like to know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Kandarin, the headgear functions as a light source and you have a chance of receiving an extra log when cutting normal trees. You can get the flax keeper to convert 30 flax

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: to bowstrings each day, coal trucks hold up to 140 coal and you'll find 5% more marks of grace on Seers' rooftop agility course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, cutting maples in Seers' village provides 10% more experience. You can spin materials 33% faster at the spinning wheel, get the flax keeper to convert 60 flax to bowstrings each day,

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: and the Catherby herb patch provides a 5% higher crop yield. Coal trucks will hold up to 280 coal too. You can also use the rope I left at Baxtorian falls, instead of bringing your own, as long as you have completed the

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Waterfall quest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, Thormac will enchant battlestaves for 30,000 gold and you can move the Camelot teleport location to outside of Seers' bank. You'll find 15% more marks of grace on Seers'

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: rooftop, receive 10% higher yield from Catherby farming patch, get the flax keeper to convert 120 flax to bowstrings each day, and get 10% more points from Barbarian Assault as well one free daily teleport to

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Sherlock. Your chances of having an enchanted bolt use it's special attack has increased by 10% too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, Thormac now enchants battlestaves for 20,000 gold, Otto will provide a 50% discount when converting Zamorakian spears into hastae. You'll get unlimited teleports to

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Sherlock and 15% increased yield from Catherby herb patch and can get the flax keeper to convert 250 flax to bow strings every day. The first 200 coal placed in coal trucks every day will be automatically transported

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: to your bank too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in Kandarin so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: See you around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Kandarin Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: This headgear is a symbol of your exploration of Kandarin. It functions as a light source and you now have a chance of receiving an extra log when cutting normal trees. You can get the flax keeper to convert

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: 30 flax to bowstrings each day, coal trucks now hold up to 140 coal and you'll find 5% more marks of grace on Seers' rooftop agility course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: If you ever lose your headgear, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Kandarin achievement diary!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I've upgraded your Kandarin headgear for you. Cutting maples in Seers' village now provide 10% more experience. You can now spin materials 33% faster at the spinning wheel, get the flax keeper to convert 60

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: flax to bowstrings each day, and the Catherby herb patch provides a 5% higher crop yield. Coal trucks will hold up to 280 coal now too. You can also use the rope I left at Baxtorian falls, instead of bringing your own,

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: as long as you have completed the Waterfall quest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Kandarin achievement diary!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I've upgraded your Kandarin headgear for you. Thormac will now enchant battlestaves for 30,000 gold and you can move the Camelot teleport location to outside of Seers' bank. You'll now find 15% more

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: marks of grace on Seers' rooftop, receive 10% higher yield from Catherby farming patch, get the flax keeper to convert 120 flax to bowstrings each day and get 10% more points from Barbarian Assault, as well one

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: free daily teleport to Sherlock. Your chances of having an enchanted bolt use its special attack has increased by 10% too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Kandarin achievement diary!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Kandarin! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: I've upgraded your Kandarin headgear for you. Thormac now enchants battlestaves for 20,000 gold, Otto will provide a 50% discount when converting Zamorakian spears into hastae. You've now got

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: unlimited daily teleports to Sherlock and 15% increased yield from Catherby herb patch and can get the flax keeper to convert 250 flax to bowstrings every day. The first 200 coal placed in coal trucks every day will

lines.speaker: The 'Wedge'
lines.text: now be automatically transported to your bank too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
